changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating event table for time-series event data.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS event ( id BIGSERIAL, channel_id INTEGER NOT NULL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, message TEXT NULL, metadata JSONB NULL, timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id, timestamp) );

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Converting event table to TimescaleDB hypertable.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_event_channel_time ON event(channel_id, timestamp DESC); CREATE INDEX idx_event_severity ON event(severity);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Configuring TimescaleDB compression for event table.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for event table, columns, and indexes.
